/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/openclaw_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/openclaw_msgs/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/task_status__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/rolling/lib:/workspace/build/openclaw_msgs:/opt/ros/rolling/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu: /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfastcdr.so.2.3.5 /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_buffer.so
